title: D-Lumina H7 LED Bulb Canbus,100W 16000LM 6500K Super Bright CSP Chip High and Low Beam,1:1 Replacement Design Halogen Lamp Non-Polarity,Plug and Play,2pcs
features: 【PERFECT BEAM PATTERN】: h7 led headlight bulb car perfectly simulate the beam design of original halogen bulbs, ensuring the same uniform light as halogen lamps. The H7 lighting is always ready to act as a high or low beam, without dazzling oncoming traffic.
【CHIPS UPDATE】: The h7 led bulb customized double-sided 3540 chips, 400% increased brightness up to 16000LM, 100W 6500K xenon white per pair for wider and farther illumination.

【1:1 HALOGEN SIZE】: The h7 led bulbs have the same size design as halogen bulbs, the latest all-in-one wireless design, no need for additional adapters, so you can avoid installation problems, just plug and use.

【DUAL HEAT DISSIPATION】: 6063 aircraft grade aluminum body, carved and hollowed out heat sink, ensure superior cooling capacity and IP68 waterproof rating. These characteristics give the D-Lumina LED H4 bulb a lifespan of up to 30,000+ hours.

【INTELLIGENT CONTROL】: 100W h7 led headlight bulb canbus error free is controlled by an intelligent driver, infinitely approaching the power of the original car, reducing the working temperature and radio interference, perfect for 99% of car models on the market,Few sensitive models can still require additional decoders.(such as: vol-vo,b-m-w,se-at,O-pel,VW,etc.) have problems like canbus errors and flickering, you need to buy a decoder（B0B63N13WF）.
description: Product Description Compared to allogeneic, D-Lumina H7 LED offers advanced performance at low cost Better Visibility: Mini dimensions like the allogeneic ampoule but with a light output three times higher than the halogène. Lower Energy Consumption: Energy saving but 400% brighter than halogène, ensuring greater stability of the ampoule. Equipped with Fan: High performance cooling system and advanced light source technology, ensuring a bulb life of up to 50,000 hours. What makes D-Lumina LED a superior choice over halogens and other LEDs? The H7 Bulb is Increased - Allowing you to see more clearly and further on the road, allowing you to react faster in case of danger and reducing the occurrence of road accidents.delivering an unparalleled nighttime driving experience.nificantly improving safety. 400% Ultra Brightness - Each bulb is equipped with 16 powerful CSP chips, utilizing cutting-edge technology to provide higher brightness than typical h7 led bulb in the market, delivering an unparalleled nighttime driving experience. The H7 Bulb is Increased - Allowing you to see more clearly and further on the road, allowing you to react faster in case of danger and reducing the occurrence of road accidents. Quick installation D-Lumina h7 led bulb as an ideal replacement, Plug and play, No need for extra connections, No need to change the dust cover. Installs in less than 10 minutes, reducing installation problems. Kind advice With updated Canbus, it fits 98% of vehicle's computer without error. But for some sensitive cars, you may need additional decoder(B0B63N13WF). If you have any questions about these H7 LED bulbs, please consult us.
